view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for linking to calendar invites and emails is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for linking to calendar invites and emails is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case confirms that a unique Zoom meeting link is automatically generated and included in the confirmation email, which directly supports the requirement of having the link added to both the calendar invite and email. The successful execution of the use case demonstrates that the system meets the specified need for calendar integration. This is further supported by the detailed description in the use case, which explicitly states that the link is added to both the therapist's and client's Google Calendar.
